resume.summary: Motivated B.Tech Computer Science student with a strong command of Python for backend development, scripting, and automation. Experienced in building APIs, data pipelines, and scalable backend services. Seeking a Python Developer Internship to apply and grow these skills.

education.coursework: Relevant Coursework: Backend Development, RESTful Services, Cloud Fundamentals, DBMS, Software Testing

technicalSkills.skillGroup: Git, GitHub, Docker, Linux, PostgreSQL, MySQL, REST APIs

experience.title: Python Developer Intern — Synapse Analytics Pvt. Ltd., Pune

bullets.bullet: Developed and maintained REST APIs using Django REST Framework for an internal reporting tool.
Wrote automation scripts that reduced manual data-entry workload by 40%.
Optimised PostgreSQL queries, improving average response time by 25%.
Built a multi-user inventory system with role-based dashboards and stock alerts.
Designed normalized database schema reducing data redundancy by 30%.
Implemented automated email notifications using Celery and Redis.
Built a scalable scraper collecting 50,000+ records daily from public sources.
Automated cleaning and loading pipeline, cutting manual processing time by 60%.
Built a high-performance URL shortening service handling 1,000+ requests/min.
Used Redis caching to reduce average response latency to under 50ms.

certification.title: Programming, Data Structures and Algorithms using Python, Score: 88/100
Python for Data Science and AI

achievements.achievement: Selected among 80 students college-wide for the Smart India Hackathon (SIH 2024) internal round.
Received the Academic Excellence Award for Semester 2 with the highest GPA (9.3) in the CSE department cohort of 120 students.
Active contributor to two college-wide technical fests, coordinating logistics and technical sessions for 150+ participants.

extracurricular.activity: Core Member, Technical Club, VIT Pune — organised hands-on workshops for 150+ students (2023–Present).
Technical Blogger — published articles on Medium covering tools and best practices relevant to the field; collectively read 4,000+ times.
Volunteer Mentor, CodeForGood (NGO Initiative) — guided 15 high school students through technology fundamentals over an 8-week programme.
